# PLAN: Replace `encoding/json` with `tinywasm/json` in mcp.go

## Context

`mcp.go` currently imports `encoding/json` and uses `map[string]any` for JSON
serialization. Both are forbidden:

- `encoding/json` must be replaced with `github.com/tinywasm/json`.
- `map[string]any` is banned in WASM code (binary bloat).
- `tinywasm/json` uses the `fmt.Fielder` interface (`Schema() []Field` /
  `Pointers() []any`) â€” not `any`-based reflection.

## Critical: ormc and generated files

`model_orm.go` starts with `// DO NOT EDIT. generated by github.com/tinywasm/orm`.
It is produced by the `ormc` CLI tool and **must never be edited by hand**.

`ormc` generates `Schema()` / `Pointers()` for **every** struct in the package:
- DB-backed structs (in `model.go`) â†’ get `ModelName()`, `ReadOne*`, `ReadAll*`, plus schema.
- Transport-only structs â†’ marked with the `// ormc:formonly` doc comment â†’ get only schema.

**`fmt.Fielder` is never written by hand.** Always define the struct, annotate it correctly,
then run `ormc` to (re)generate `model_orm.go`.

```bash
go install github.com/tinywasm/orm/cmd/ormc@latest
ormc   # run at the module root; rewrites model_orm.go
```

## Files to change

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `mcp.go` | Remove `encoding/json`; replace `map[string]any` marshaling with `json.Encode` / `json.Decode` using the new response/arg structs |
| `model.go` | Add the four transport structs with `// ormc:formonly` |
| `model_orm.go` | **Regenerate** by running `ormc` after editing `model.go` â€” do not edit directly |

`mcp_test.go` and `go.mod` are **not** changed in this task.

---

## Step 1 â€” Add transport structs to `model.go` and regenerate

Add the four transport structs to `model.go`, each preceded by the `// ormc:formonly`
doc comment so `ormc` generates only `Schema()` / `Pointers()` (no `ModelName`,
no `ReadOne*`/`ReadAll*`).

**`fmt.Fielder` is never written by hand â€” always regenerate with `ormc`.**

```go
// ormc:formonly
type statusEmptyResult struct {
	IsEnabled bool
	ChangedAt int64
}

// ormc:formonly
type statusResult struct {
	IsEnabled bool
	ChangedBy string
	ChangedAt int64
	Reason    string
}

// ormc:formonly
// toggleArgs holds the incoming JSON parameters for the Toggle handler.
// IsEnabled uses plain bool; both true and false are valid toggle values.
// ChangedBy is required (db:"not_null").
type toggleArgs struct {
	IsEnabled bool
	ChangedBy string `db:"not_null"`
	Reason    string
}

// ormc:formonly
type toggleResult struct {
	OK        bool
	IsEnabled bool
}
```

After editing `model.go`, run `ormc` at the module root to regenerate `model_orm.go`:

```bash
ormc
```

The generated file will contain `Schema()` and `Pointers()` for all four structs
alongside the existing `AgentSwitch` implementation.

---

## Step 2 â€” Update import block

Remove `"encoding/json"`, add `"github.com/tinywasm/json"`:

```go
import (
	"github.com/tinywasm/context"
	"github.com/tinywasm/fmt"
	"github.com/tinywasm/json"
	"github.com/tinywasm/mcp"
	"github.com/tinywasm/orm"
	"github.com/tinywasm/unixid"
)
```

---

## Step 3 â€” Rewrite `GetStatus`

Replace the two `json.Marshal(map[string]any{...})` calls:

**Empty-rows branch** (replace lines 60-61):
```go
var out string
_ = json.Encode(&statusEmptyResult{}, &out)
return mcp.Text(out), nil
```

**Row-found branch** (replace lines 71-77):
```go
var out string
_ = json.Encode(&statusResult{
    IsEnabled: r.IsEnabled,
    ChangedBy: r.ChangedBy,
    ChangedAt: ts,
    Reason:    r.Reason,
}, &out)
return mcp.Text(out), nil
```

---

## Step 4 â€” Rewrite `Toggle`

Replace the anonymous struct decode (lines 82-89):

```go
var args toggleArgs
if err := json.Decode(req.Params.Arguments, &args); err != nil || args.ChangedBy == "" {
    return &mcp.Result{IsError: true, Content: fmt.Err("params", "invalid").Error()}, nil
}
```

> `req.Params.Arguments` is `string`; `json.Decode` accepts `string` directly
> (see `decode.go` line 16).

Replace the `ChangedBy` guard (original lines 90-92 â€” now merged into above).

Replace the final marshal (lines 103-105):
```go
var out string
_ = json.Encode(&toggleResult{OK: true, IsEnabled: args.IsEnabled}, &out)
return mcp.Text(out), nil
```

---

## Step 5 â€” Update `go.mod`

Move `tinywasm/json` from `indirect` to a direct dependency:

```
require (
    ...
    github.com/tinywasm/json v0.4.0
    ...
)
```

Run `go mod tidy` after the edits to confirm the graph is clean.

---

## Checklist

- [x] Add four `// ormc:formonly` structs to `model.go`
- [x] Run `ormc` to regenerate `model_orm.go`
- [x] Remove `"encoding/json"` import from `mcp.go`
- [x] Add `"github.com/tinywasm/json"` import to `mcp.go`
- [x] Rewrite `GetStatus` â€” both branches use `json.Encode`
- [x] Rewrite `Toggle` â€” args use `json.Decode`, result uses `json.Encode`
- [x] Remove all `map[string]any` usage from `mcp.go`
- [x] Run `go build ./...` and `go test ./...` to verify
